sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116318" key="w)resi/doupos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠρεσίδουπος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀρεσίδουπος,</foreign> <sense id="n116318.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making a din on the mountains,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.25</biblScope> </bibl> (Scaliger for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὠρεσίλοιπος;</foreign> he also suggested <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-κοιτος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
